task_description: Replace MongoDB/Mongoose entirely with PostgreSQL/Sequelize ORM. Rewrite all 7 models, services, controllers, seed script, and serverless entry point. Maintain the same REST API contract so the frontend works unchanged. Use free PostgreSQL providers (Neon/Supabase). Implement row-level locking for booking concurrency.

verification.summary: npm install succeeds. All 61 integration tests pass (verify.mjs with SQLite in-memory). App imports cleanly. No mongoose references remain. Vercel entry point works. Review findings addressed: User defaultScope excludes password, bookedSeats uses atomic SQL array_cat/array_remove on PostgreSQL. Tests cover: health, auth, RBAC, movie CRUD+search+pagination, theatre+screen, show+seatmap, booking lock/confirm/cancel, concurrency (unique constraint prevents double-booking), reviews+rating updates.
